raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Hidden blockers","name":"What dependency is most likely to quietly stall you next?","description":"Surfaces the next risk that may not be visible in the intro blocker scan.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Escalation point","name":"What part of this work needs escalation from me now?","description":"Finds where manager intervention would remove friction or unblock progress.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sustainable pace","name":"What would make your current pace hard to sustain for another month?","description":"Tests whether the current load is still sustainable beyond the immediate sprint.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recovery pattern","name":"How are you actually recovering between workdays?","description":"Checks whether energy is being restored or just carried forward on momentum.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Ownership signal","name":"Where have you been leaning in without being asked lately?","description":"Looks for initiative, ownership, and self-directed engagement beyond assigned tasks.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Drift check","name":"What part of your work has started to feel like maintenance?","description":"Surfaces disengagement or stagnation in the current scope.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stretch edge","name":"What kind of work would stretch you in a useful way right now?","description":"Identifies the next level of challenge that would feel developmental rather than random.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback loop","name":"Where are you getting the kind of feedback that actually helps you improve?","description":"Checks whether he is receiving usable developmental feedback in the flow of work.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision clarity","name":"Which decision do you wish were made sooner?","description":"Finds ambiguity or waiting that is slowing execution and creating uncertainty.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support gap","name":"What do you need from me that you are not getting yet?","description":"Surfaces missing manager support without assuming there is a problem.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Learning edge","name":"What have you been learning on the job that you want more of?","description":"Explores growth momentum and whether the current work is teaching the right things.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]}]}
